title: typha angustifolia subsp. angustata
intro: Typha angustifolia subsp. angustata, also known as narrow-leaved cattail or narrow-leaf cattail, is a subspecies of the Typha angustifolia plant, which belongs to the cattail family and is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Typha angustifolia subsp. angustata include reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
